# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy-staging
  - deploy-production

variables:
  SECURE_LOG_LEVEL: "info"
  GIT_DEPTH: 10
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: none

default:
  timeout: 30m
  retry:
    max: 2
    when:
      - runner_system_failure
      - stuck_or_timeout_failure

# Build stage - compiles binaries and prepares configs
build-app:
  stage: build
  image: golang:1.21-alpine
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git make checksumming-tools
    - echo "Build started at $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
  script:
    - mkdir -p build/bin build/configs build/checksums
    # Build the application binary
    - CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w -X main.version=${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" -o build/bin/app ./cmd/app
    - CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o build/bin/migrator ./cmd/migrator
    # Copy configuration files
    - cp -r configs/* build/configs/
    # Substitute environment-specific placeholders safely (no secrets in configs)
    - sed -i "s/__BUILD_VERSION__/${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}/g" build/configs/*.yaml
    - sed -i "s/__BUILD_PIPELINE__/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/g" build/configs/*.yaml
    # Generate checksums for integrity verification
    - cd build && find . -type f \( -name "*.yaml" -o -name "app" -o -name "migrator" \) -exec sha256sum {} \; > checksums/SHA256SUMS
    - cd ..
    # Display build manifest
    - echo "CI_COMMIT_SHA=${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" > build/BUILD_MANIFEST
    - echo "CI_PIPELINE_ID=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}" >> build/BUILD_MANIFEST
    - echo "CI_JOB_ID=${CI_JOB_ID}" >> build/BUILD_MANIFEST
    - echo "BUILD_TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> build/BUILD_MANIFEST
    - cat build/BUILD_MANIFEST
    - cat build/checksums/SHA256SUMS
  artifacts:
    name: "build-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
    paths:
      - build/bin/
      - build/configs/
      - build/checksums/
      - build/BUILD_MANIFEST
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: on_success
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG =~ /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/'

build-docker:
  stage: build
  image: docker:24-dind
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  variables:
    DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR: "/certs"
    DOCKER_BUILDKIT: "1"
  before_script:
    - echo "${CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD}" | docker login -u "${CI_REGISTRY_USER}" --password-stdin "${CI_REGISTRY}"
  script:
    - |
      docker build \
        --no-cache \
        --pull \
        --label "org.opencontainers.image.source=${CI_PROJECT_URL}" \
        --label "org.opencontainers.image.revision=${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" \
        --label "org.opencontainers.image.created=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" \
        --tag "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" \
        --tag "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:pipeline-${CI_PIPELINE_ID}" \
        .
    - docker push "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    - docker push "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:pipeline-${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
    # Save image digest for downstream verification
    - mkdir -p build/docker
    - docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" > build/docker/IMAGE_DIGEST
    - cat build/docker/IMAGE_DIGEST
  artifacts:
    name: "docker-meta-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - build/docker/
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: on_success
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG =~ /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/'

# Test stage - downloads build artifacts and runs tests
test-unit:
  stage: test
  image: golang:1.21-alpine
  needs:
    - job: build-app
      artifacts: true
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache make
  script:
    # Verify artifact integrity before using
    - cd build && sha256sum -c checksums/SHA256SUMS && cd ..
    - echo "Artifacts verified successfully"
    - go test -race -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic ./...
    - go tool cover -func=coverage.out
  artifacts:
    name: "test-coverage-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - coverage.out
    expire_in: 30 days
    reports:
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage.xml
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'

test-integration:
  stage: test
  image: golang:1.21-alpine
  needs:
    - job: build-app
      artifacts: true
  services:
    - name: postgres:15-alpine
      alias: testdb
  variables:
    POSTGRES_DB: testdb
    POSTGRES_USER: testuser
    POSTGRES_PASSWORD: "${TEST_DB_PASSWORD}"
    POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD: scram-sha-256
    POSTGRES_INITDB_ARGS: "--auth-host=scram-sha-256"
    DATABASE_URL: "postgres://testuser:${TEST_DB_PASSWORD}@testdb:5432/testdb?sslmode=disable"
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache postgresql-client
  script:
    # Verify artifact integrity
    - cd build && sha256sum -c checksums/SHA256SUMS && cd ..
    # Run database migrations using built migrator
    - chmod 500 build/bin/migrator
    - ./build/bin/migrator --config build/configs/test.yaml up
    # Run integration tests
    - go test -tags=integration -timeout=10m ./...
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'

test-security-scan:
  stage: test
  image: golang:1.21-alpine
  needs:
    - job: build-app
      artifacts: true
  before_script:
    - go install golang.org/x/vuln/cmd/govulncheck@latest
  script:
    # Verify artifact integrity
    - cd build && sha256sum -c checksums/SHA256SUMS && cd ..
    # Run vulnerability scanning
    - govulncheck ./...
    # Check binary for known issues
    - file build/bin/app
    - file build/bin/migrator
  allow_failure: false
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG =~ /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/'

# Staging deployment - downloads artifacts and deploys
deploy-staging:
  stage: deploy-staging
  image: alpine:3.18
  needs:
    - job: build-app
      artifacts: true
    - job: build-docker
      artifacts: true
    - job: test-unit
      artifacts: false
    - job: test-integration
      artifacts: false
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
    on_stop: stop-staging
  variables:
    DEPLOY_ENV: staging
    # Prevent secret leakage in logs
    GIT_STRATEGY: none
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client curl jq
    # Set up SSH with restricted permissions
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - echo "${STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY}" | tr -d '\r' > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - echo "${STAGING_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS}" > ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    # Verify artifact integrity before deployment
    - cd build && sha256sum -c checksums/SHA256SUMS && cd ..
    - echo "All artifact checksums verified"
    # Verify docker image digest
    - cat build/docker/IMAGE_DIGEST
    # Verify BUILD_MANIFEST matches expected pipeline
    - grep "CI_PIPELINE_ID=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}" build/BUILD_MANIFEST
    - echo "Build manifest verified for pipeline ${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
    # Deploy binaries to staging server via SCP with strict host checking
    - |
      scp -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key \
        -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
        -o BatchMode=yes \
        -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
        build/bin/app \
        build/bin/migrator \
        "deploy@${STAGING_HOST}:/opt/app/releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/"
    # Deploy configs
    - |
      scp -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key \
        -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
        -o BatchMode=yes \
        build/configs/staging.yaml \
        "deploy@${STAGING_HOST}:/opt/app/releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/config.yaml"
    # Execute deployment script on remote server
    - |
      ssh -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key \
        -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
        -o BatchMode=yes \
        -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
        "deploy@${STAGING_HOST}" \
        "cd /opt/app && \
         chmod 500 releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/app releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/migrator && \
         chmod 400 releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/config.yaml && \
         ./releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/migrator --config releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/config.yaml up && \
         ln -sfn releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID} current && \
         sudo systemctl restart app.service && \
         sleep 5 && \
         curl -sf http://localhost:8080/health || exit 1"
    - echo "Staging deployment completed successfully"
  after_script:
    # Clean up sensitive files regardless of job outcome
    - rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - rm -rf ~/.ssh
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
      when: on_success
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'
      when: manual

stop-staging:
  stage: deploy-staging
  image: alpine:3.18
  variables:
    GIT_STRATEGY: none
  environment:
    name: staging
    action: stop
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh && chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - echo "${STAGING_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY}" | tr -d '\r' > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - echo "${STAGING_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS}" > ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - |
      ssh -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key \
        -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
        -o BatchMode=yes \
        "deploy@${STAGING_HOST}" \
        "sudo systemctl stop app.service"
  after_script:
    - rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - rm -rf ~/.ssh
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
      when: manual
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'
      when: manual

# Production deployment - requires manual approval and tag
deploy-production:
  stage: deploy-production
  image: alpine:3.18
  needs:
    - job: build-app
      artifacts: true
    - job: build-docker
      artifacts: true
    - job: test-security-scan
      artifacts: false
    - job: deploy-staging
      artifacts: false
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://app.example.com
  variables:
    DEPLOY_ENV: production
    GIT_STRATEGY: none
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client curl jq
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh && chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - echo "${PRODUCTION_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY}" | tr -d '\r' > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - echo "${PRODUCTION_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS}" > ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    # Strict artifact integrity verification for production
    - cd build && sha256sum -c checksums/SHA256SUMS && cd ..
    - grep "CI_PIPELINE_ID=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}" build/BUILD_MANIFEST
    - echo "Production artifact verification passed"
    # Verify docker image digest exists and is valid
    - test -s build/docker/IMAGE_DIGEST
    - DIGEST=$(cat build/docker/IMAGE_DIGEST)
    - echo "Deploying image digest ${DIGEST}"
    # Create release directory on production servers
    - |
      for HOST in ${PRODUCTION_HOSTS}; do
        echo "Deploying to ${HOST}..."
        scp -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key \
          -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
          -o BatchMode=yes \
          -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
          build/bin/app \
          build/bin/migrator \
          "deploy@${HOST}:/opt/app/releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/"

        scp -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key \
          -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
          -o BatchMode=yes \
          build/configs/production.yaml \
          "deploy@${HOST}:/opt/app/releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/config.yaml"

        ssh -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key \
          -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
          -o BatchMode=yes \
          -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
          "deploy@${HOST}" \
          "cd /opt/app && \
           chmod 500 releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/app releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/migrator && \
           chmod 400 releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/config.yaml && \
           ./releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/migrator --config releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID}/config.yaml up && \
           ln -sfn releases/${CI_PIPELINE_ID} current && \
           sudo systemctl restart app.service && \
           sleep 10 && \
           curl -sf http://localhost:8080/health || exit 1"

        echo "Deployment to ${HOST} completed"
      done
    # Post-deployment verification
    - |
      sleep 15
      HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 30 "https://app.example.com/health")
      if [ "${HTTP_STATUS}" != "200" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Production health check failed with status ${HTTP_STATUS}"
        exit 1
      fi
      echo "Production health check passed (HTTP ${HTTP_STATUS})"
    # Keep only last 5 releases on each server
    - |
      for HOST in ${PRODUCTION_HOSTS}; do
        ssh -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key \
          -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
          -o BatchMode=yes \
          "deploy@${HOST}" \
          "cd /opt/app/releases && ls -1t | tail -n +6 | xargs -r rm -rf"
      done
  after_script:
    - rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - rm -rf ~/.ssh
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG =~ /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/'
      when: manual
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
      when: manual
  allow_failure: false

# Rollback job - uses artifacts from a previous pipeline
rollback-production:
  stage: deploy-production
  image: alpine:3.18
  variables:
    GIT_STRATEGY: none
    ROLLBACK_PIPELINE_ID: ""
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://app.example.com
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client curl
    - |
      if [ -z "${ROLLBACK_PIPELINE_ID}" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: ROLLBACK_PIPELINE_ID variable must be set"
        exit 1
      fi
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh && chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - echo "${PRODUCTION_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY}" | tr -d '\r' > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - echo "${PRODUCTION_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS}" > ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - echo "Rolling back to pipeline ${ROLLBACK_PIPELINE_ID}"
    - |
      for HOST in ${PRODUCTION_HOSTS}; do
        echo "Rolling back ${HOST}..."
        ssh -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key \
          -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
          -o BatchMode=yes \
          "deploy@${HOST}" \
          "cd /opt/app && \
           test -d releases/${ROLLBACK_PIPELINE_ID} || { echo 'Release not found'; exit 1; } && \
           ln -sfn releases/${ROLLBACK_PIPELINE_ID} current && \
           sudo systemctl restart app.service && \
           sleep 10 && \
           curl -sf http://localhost:8080/health || exit 1"
        echo "Rollback on ${HOST} completed"
      done
    - echo "Rollback to pipeline ${ROLLBACK_PIPELINE_ID} completed"
  after_script:
    - rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key
    - rm -rf ~/.ssh
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
      when: manual
  allow_failure: false
